privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified paths: Notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/new_construction_premium.ipynb, Data at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. Expected outputs: /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_premium_analysis.csv, /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/premium_scatter.png, /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/top_premium_zones.png. CSV must contain columns: zone_id, new_units, existing_units, median_price_new, median_price_existing, price_premium_ratio. Filtering requires >= 20 new units, >= 50 existing units, and vintage cutoff year 2000. Note: 'zone_id' resides in the 'parcels' table, not 'buildings', so the agent must join the 'buildings' table with 'parcels' to correctly extract the zones. If the agent fails to join these tables, their analysis is mathematically invalid even if it runs.
